_comment: Schneider Electric solution catalog. Pricing is in EUR/m2 of floor area and is an ILLUSTRATIVE, ADJUSTABLE benchmark (not an official Schneider quote). energy_saving_fraction is the fraction of the TARGETED end-use(s) avoided. Reduce is the priority pillar (indirect market for SE efficiency solutions). Product names are real EcoStruxure/SpaceLogic/Altivar offerings; savings ranges are from public Schneider material and industry benchmarks (see source).

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Connected Room (SpaceLogic occupancy control)
reduce.product: SpaceLogic room controllers + Insight-Sensor + EcoStruxure Building Operation
reduce.note: Occupancy- and people-count-based control of HVAC and lighting at room level.
reduce.source: Schneider: Connected Room Solutions deliver up to 23% energy savings.

reduce.name: LED relamping + lighting management
reduce.product: SpaceLogic / KNX lighting control + LED luminaires
reduce.note: LED retrofit with daylight harvesting and presence control.
reduce.source: Industry benchmark ~EUR 20-40/m2; LED + controls cut lighting 40-60%.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Building Operation + Building Advisor (BMS + fault detection)
reduce.product: EcoStruxure Building Operation, EcoStruxure Building Advisor
reduce.note: Continuous commissioning, fault detection & diagnostics, setpoint optimisation.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Building Activate (small / mid-size buildings)
reduce.note: Cloud building management for buildings under ~9,300 m2; alternative to Building Operation.
reduce.source: Schneider: EcoStruxure Building Activate for buildings under 100,000 sq ft.

reduce.name: Altivar variable speed drives on HVAC motors
reduce.product: Altivar process / HVAC variable speed drives
reduce.note: Speed control of pumps and fans replaces throttling/damper losses.
reduce.source: VSDs on pumps/fans typically cut motor energy 20-30%.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Power Monitoring (PME + PowerTag)
reduce.product: EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert + PowerTag energy sensors
reduce.note: Sub-metering visibility and alarms drive operational/behavioural savings across all loads.

reduce.name: Smart plug-load management
reduce.note: Standby control and scheduling of plug and office loads.
reduce.source: Plug-load scheduling and standby control typically save 15-20%.

replace.name: Rooftop solar PV
replace.product: Schneider Conext inverters + EcoStruxure Microgrid Operation
replace.source: Sizing from usable roof area and location specific yield.

replace.name: Battery energy storage
replace.product: Schneider battery + EcoStruxure Microgrid Advisor dispatch
replace.note: Shifts daytime PV surplus into evening load to lift self-consumption.

replace.name: Green power PPA / RECs
replace.product: Schneider Energy & Sustainability Services (PPA / REC sourcing)
replace.note: Cleans residual grid import on a market-based basis (Scope 2 market).
replace.source: Contractual instrument; affects market-based Scope 2 only.

electrify.name: Electrify gas heating with heat pumps
electrify.product: Heat pump plant + EcoStruxure Building Operation control
electrify.note: Removes Scope 1 combustion; adds a smaller electric load via heat-pump COP.
electrify.source: Heat pump COP ~3.2 vs boiler efficiency ~0.88.

electrify.name: Replace standby genset with grid + storage
electrify.note: Removes diesel combustion by sourcing standby power from grid/storage.

electrify.name: Electrify combustion vehicle fleet
electrify.product: EVlink Pro chargers + EcoStruxure EV Charging Expert
electrify.note: Replaces fleet fuel with EV charging load (much higher drivetrain efficiency).
electrify.source: EV final energy ~30% of fossil final energy.
